title: Wings from the In-Between
description: A resource pack that provides a series of Name Dependent custom wing textures.
body:
A resource pack that provides a series of Name Dependent custom wing textures.

This pack uses [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)to provide custom textures dependent on what you've named your elytra! For ease of access, also consider downloading [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) !
Wings from the In-Between
